# Carlos Rojas — Software Engineer | krlz.dev

> Senior Software Engineer with MSc. in Software Engineering and 14+ years of experience in full-stack development, microservices architecture, cloud-native systems, and AI-powered applications. Based in Santiago, Chile.

Carlos Rojas specializes in Java, Scala, TypeScript, and Python. He has built healthcare platforms processing millions of patient records (FHIR/Medmij compliant), logistics and telemetry systems on AWS, and AI applications using LangChain and RAG architectures. He holds a Master's degree from Innopolis University, Russia.

## Projects

- [kit-a — Architecture & Planning Toolkit](https://kit-a.com/): Browser-based toolkit for system architecture diagrams and Gantt project planning. Co-founded with maryaleks.dev.
- [ZooMinder — Pet Medication Tracker](https://zoo-minder.com/): Android app for scheduling pet medication reminders and tracking treatment histories. Co-founded with maryaleks.dev.
- [Constitutional AI Assistant](https://asistente-constitucional.vercel.app/): AI-powered legal assistant using RAG architecture for Bolivia's constitutional data, designed to prevent hallucinations.
- [Logistics & Telemetry Platform](https://krlz.dev/projects/tracktec-logistics/): Full-stack logistics software at TrackTec with Kafka integration, automated data pipelines, and AWS infrastructure.
- [Healthcare FHIR System](https://krlz.dev/projects/portavita-health-fhir/): FHIR HAPI-based healthcare system for the Tatarstan government with Spring Boot, Python tooling, and Kafka legacy integration.
- [DVZA Healthcare Platform](https://krlz.dev/projects/dvza-healthcare-platform/): Data services platform for Dutch healthcare institutions processing millions of patient records, Medmij and FHIR compliant.
- [Application-Aware Disaster Recovery](https://krlz.dev/projects/acronis-disaster-recovery/): Research at Acronis on disaster recovery and data resilience, published as academic paper at Innopolis University.
- [COFAR Labs Data Systems](https://krlz.dev/projects/cofar-data-systems/): System module improvements and monolith-to-microservices migration for a pharmaceutical laboratory.
- [E-Constitucional](https://krlz.dev/projects/econstitucional/): Bolivia's first free online constitutional encyclopedia, built with the Vice Presidency Office.

## Skills

- **Languages:** TypeScript, JavaScript, Java, Scala, Python, HTML/CSS, Bash
- **Frontend:** React, Next.js, Angular, Svelte, Vue, Tailwind CSS
- **Backend:** Spring Boot, Node.js, Express, Akka, Flask, LangChain
- **Data & Messaging:** PostgreSQL, MySQL, Redis, Kafka, RabbitMQ, DynamoDB, ElasticSearch
- **DevOps & Cloud:** Docker, Kubernetes, AWS, Jenkins, CI/CD, Linux
- **Architecture:** Microservices, MVC, OOD, Functional Patterns, OAuth2/OpenID, FHIR

## Education

- MSc. Information Technology: Software Engineering — Innopolis University, Russia
- BSc. Systems Engineering — Universidad Nuestra Señora de La Paz, Bolivia
- Software Engineering Specialization — Hong Kong University of Science and Technology
- Functional Programming in Scala — EPFL (École polytechnique fédérale de Lausanne)
- Build RAG Applications — IBM
